title: T-004 — Migration: allergen tables (item profiles, manufacturing_op additions, contamination risk)
prompt: Create Drizzle migration for the allergen family per §5.4. Tables: `item_allergen_profiles`(org_id,item_id,allergen_code [TEXT, soft FK reference_tables.allergens_reference.row_key], source TEXT CHECK in ('brief_declared','supplier_spec','lab_result','cascaded','manual_override'), intensity TEXT DEFAULT 'contains' CHECK in ('contains','may_contain','trace'), confidence TEXT DEFAULT 'declared' CHECK in ('declared','tested','assumed'), declared_by, declared_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), manual_override_reason TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (org_id,item_id,allergen_code)). `manufacturing_operation_allergen_additions`(org_id, manufacturing_operation_name TEXT, allergen_code, reason TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (org_id,manufacturing_operation_name,allergen_code)). `allergen_contamination_risk`(id PK, org_id, line_id UUID nullable, machine_id UUID nullable, allergen_code, risk_level TEXT CHECK in ('high','medium','low','segregated'), mitigation TEXT, last_assessed_at, assessed_by). RLS org_id-scoped on all three. RED in tests/db/allergens.migration.test.ts. Command: `pnpm vitest run tests/db/allergens.migration.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Three allergen-domain tables with RLS, source/intensity/confidence enums, contamination risk grid.
pipeline_inputs.details: allergen_code is TEXT with no hard FK — soft reference to reference_tables.allergens_reference (02-SETTINGS) so EU-14 + org custom rows are valid. manufacturing_operation_name aligned with reference_tables.manufacturing_operations.row_key (00-FOUNDATION §9.1). line_id and machine_id reference 02-SETTINGS.production_lines/machines (FK if present, else soft).
acceptance_criteria: Given migration applied, when inserting an item_allergen_profiles row with invalid intensity, then CHECK rejects.
Given two orgs share the same allergen_code, when RLS is active per org, then rows from the other org are not visible.
Given allergen_contamination_risk row with risk_level not in enum, then insert fails.
test_strategy: RED tests for CHECK constraints and RLS isolation.
risk_red_lines: Do not introduce hard FK on allergen_code — keep schema-driven extensibility per ADR-028.
